---
title: "Workshop Slides"
---

View the workshop presentation in full-screen mode:

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0;">
  <a href="slides.html" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
    Open Slides in New Window
  </a>
</div>

Or preview below:

<style>
.slide-deck {
    border: 3px solid #dee2e6;
    width: 100%;
    height: 600px;
}
</style>

<div>
```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html"></iframe>
```
</div>
